{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Full Stack Web Developer",
  "description": "Mshel Homes Limited is a real estate development and marketing company incorporated in 2018 with a unique vision to be the leading real estate company in Nigeria, with an outstanding reputation for honesty, integrity and impeccable customer service.

At Mshel Homes Limited our mission is to create a lifetime relationship with our clientele by deliverying property solutions through innovative and technological driven processes that caters to your real estate needs whilst adhering to the highest standards, systems and performance goals necessary to achieving your dreams.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Full Stack Web Developer

Job Location:&nbsp;Abuja
Job type: Full-time (Onsite)

Job Description


	We are seeking a driven and versatile Full Stack Web Developer to join our growing engineering team.
	The ideal candidate possesses a deep command of both front-end and back-end technologies&mdash;capable of architecting robust, scalable systems while crafting intuitive, pixel-perfect user interfaces.
	You will be a key driver in translating product requirements into high-performing web applications, collaborating across design, product, and infrastructure teams to deliver exceptional digital experiences from concept to deployment.


Key Responsibilities


	End-to-End Development:&nbsp;Design, build, and maintain both client-side and server-side components of web applications, taking full ownership of features from database schema to UI interaction.
	Frontend Engineering:&nbsp;Develop responsive, accessible, and performant user interfaces using modern JavaScript frameworks (React, Vue, or Angular), ensuring cross-browser compatibility and adherence to UI/UX design specifications.
	Backend Architecture:&nbsp;Build and maintain RESTful APIs and GraphQL endpoints, implement business logic, manage databases (relational and non-relational), and integrate third-party services and APIs.
	Database Design &amp; Management:&nbsp;Design, optimize, and manage database structures across SQL (PostgreSQL, MySQL) and NoSQL (MongoDB, Redis) platforms to ensure data integrity, performance, and scalability.
	Code Quality &amp; Review:&nbsp;Write clean, well-documented, and testable code; actively participate in code reviews to maintain engineering standards and share knowledge across the team.
	DevOps &amp; Deployment:&nbsp;Collaborate with DevOps to manage CI/CD pipelines, containerized environments (Docker, Kubernetes), and cloud infrastructure (AWS, GCP, or Azure) to ensure reliable and repeatable deployments.
	Technical Problem-Solving:&nbsp;Diagnose and resolve complex technical issues across the full stack, proactively identifying bottlenecks and performance vulnerabilities before they impact users.
	Cross-Functional Collaboration:&nbsp;Work closely with product managers, UX/UI designers, and QA engineers to translate wireframes and business requirements into fully functional product features.
	Security &amp; Compliance:&nbsp;Implement best practices for application security, including authentication, authorization, data encryption, and protection against common vulnerabilities (OWASP standards).
	Continuous Improvement:&nbsp;Stay current with emerging web technologies, frameworks, and industry trends; champion improvements to the development process, architecture, and tooling.


Qualifications
Required Skills &amp; Experience:


	Full Stack Proficiency:&nbsp;Proven experience as a Full Stack Developer with a demonstrable portfolio of web applications built across both front-end and back-end layers.
	Frontend Mastery:&nbsp;Strong command of HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript (ES6+), with hands-on experience in at least one major framework&mdash;React, Vue.js, or Angular.
	Backend Expertise:&nbsp;Solid experience with server-side languages and frameworks such as Node.js (Express/NestJS), Python (Django/FastAPI), or PHP (Laravel).
	Database Management:&nbsp;Working knowledge of both relational (PostgreSQL, MySQL) and non-relational (MongoDB, Redis) databases, including query optimization and data modeling.
	API Development:&nbsp;Experience designing, building, and consuming RESTful APIs and/or GraphQL services.
	Version Control:&nbsp;Proficiency with Git-based workflows (GitHub, GitLab, or Bitbucket), including branching strategies, pull requests, and merge conflict resolution.
	Familiarity with cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, or Azure) and containerization tools (Docker, Kubernetes).
	Understanding of web application security principles and OWASP guidelines.
	Experience with Agile/Scrum development methodologies and project management tools (Jira, Linear, or Trello).
	Background in automated testing (Jest, Cypress, PyTest) and CI/CD pipeline configuration.
",
  "datePosted": "2026-05-07",
  "validThrough": "2026-06-08",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

  },

Full Stack Web Developer Job at Mshel Homes Limited




        
    

        
        Mshel Homes Limited is a real estate development and marketing company incorporated in 2018 with a unique vision to be the leading real estate company in Nigeria, with an outstanding reputation for honesty, integrity and impeccable customer service.

At Mshel Homes Limited our mission is to create a lifetime relationship with our clientele by deliverying property solutions through innovative and technological driven processes that caters to your real estate needs whilst adhering to the highest standards, systems and performance goals necessary to achieving your dreams.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Full Stack Web Developer
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Location: Abuja
Job type: Full-time (Onsite)

Job Description


	We are seeking a driven and versatile Full Stack Web Developer to join our growing engineering team.
	The ideal candidate possesses a deep command of both front-end and back-end technologies—capable of architecting robust, scalable systems while crafting intuitive, pixel-perfect user interfaces.
	You will be a key driver in translating product requirements into high-performing web applications, collaborating across design, product, and infrastructure teams to deliver exceptional digital experiences from concept to deployment.


Key Responsibilities


	End-to-End Development: Design, build, and maintain both client-side and server-side components of web applications, taking full ownership of features from database schema to UI interaction.
	Frontend Engineering: Develop responsive, accessible, and performant user interfaces using modern JavaScript frameworks (React, Vue, or Angular), ensuring cross-browser compatibility and adherence to UI/UX design specifications.
	Backend Architecture: Build and maintain RESTful APIs and GraphQL endpoints, implement business logic, manage databases (relational and non-relational), and integrate third-party services and APIs.
	Database Design & Management: Design, optimize, and manage database structures across SQL (PostgreSQL, MySQL) and NoSQL (MongoDB, Redis) platforms to ensure data integrity, performance, and scalability.
	Code Quality & Review: Write clean, well-documented, and testable code; actively participate in code reviews to maintain engineering standards and share knowledge across the team.
	DevOps & Deployment: Collaborate with DevOps to manage CI/CD pipelines, containerized environments (Docker, Kubernetes), and cloud infrastructure (AWS, GCP, or Azure) to ensure reliable and repeatable deployments.
	Technical Problem-Solving: Diagnose and resolve complex technical issues across the full stack, proactively identifying bottlenecks and performance vulnerabilities before they impact users.
	Cross-Functional Collaboration: Work closely with product managers, UX/UI designers, and QA engineers to translate wireframes and business requirements into fully functional product features.
	Security & Compliance: Implement best practices for application security, including authentication, authorization, data encryption, and protection against common vulnerabilities (OWASP standards).
	Continuous Improvement: Stay current with emerging web technologies, frameworks, and industry trends; champion improvements to the development process, architecture, and tooling.


Qualifications
Required Skills & Experience:


	Full Stack Proficiency: Proven experience as a Full Stack Developer with a demonstrable portfolio of web applications built across both front-end and back-end layers.
	Frontend Mastery: Strong command of HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript (ES6+), with hands-on experience in at least one major framework—React, Vue.js, or Angular.
	Backend Expertise: Solid experience with server-side languages and frameworks such as Node.js (Express/NestJS), Python (Django/FastAPI), or PHP (Laravel).
	Database Management: Working knowledge of both relational (PostgreSQL, MySQL) and non-relational (MongoDB, Redis) databases, including query optimization and data modeling.
	API Development: Experience designing, building, and consuming RESTful APIs and/or GraphQL services.
	Version Control: Proficiency with Git-based workflows (GitHub, GitLab, or Bitbucket), including branching strategies, pull requests, and merge conflict resolution.
	Familiarity with cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, or Azure) and containerization tools (Docker, Kubernetes).
	Understanding of web application security principles and OWASP guidelines.
	Experience with Agile/Scrum development methodologies and project management tools (Jira, Linear, or Trello).
	Background in automated testing (Jest, Cypress, PyTest) and CI/CD pipeline configuration.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "description": "Green Africa Airways Limited is a value airline based in Lagos, Nigeria. We are a new carrier that offers safe, reliable and affordable air travel to a much broader group of customers. This positions us as a significant contributor to the economic development of Nigeria and the African continent.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;CAMO Engineer

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos, Nigeria
Job type: Full-time (Onsite)
Workplace Type:&nbsp;Onsite

Job Role


	Evaluating technical publications to determine their applicability to Green Africa&rsquo;s fleet such as ADs, SBs, modification publications and repair documents&nbsp;
	Creating and issuing of engineering order as may be required to maintain Green Africa&#39;s fleet in the original state of configuration and complying with applicable publications from the manufacturers and NCAA&rsquo;s regulatory
	Updating Green Africa&rsquo;s maintenance manuals such as MP, MCM and RPM as required by internal procedures and NCAA&rsquo;s regulations
	Monitoring all maintenance documents and ensuring that they are up to date
	Working closely with Technical Planning and Quality Team to ensure compliance with NCAA&rsquo;s regulations
	Tracking, monitoring, and investigating performance of aircraft systems and components


Qualifications


	Bachelor&#39;s degree or HND in Aeronautical Engineering, Aircraft Maintenance Engineering, or a related field
	3-5 years of experience as a CAMO Engineer
	Familiarity with aircraft maintenance software and record-keeping systems





Must have skills:


	Attention to detail
	Effective prioritization of task
	Knowledge of maintenance software and record-keeping systems
	Knowledge of relevant regulatory requirements
	Planning Skill


Good to have skills:


	Analytical skill


What We Offer


	Competitive salary and performance-based incentives tied to strategic outcomes.
	A senior leadership platform with direct access to the MD and Board.
	Career growth and executive development opportunities within a growing real estate group.
	A dynamic, innovative, and professional work environment at one of Abuja&rsquo;s leading property companies.

CAMO Engineer Job at Green Africa Airways Limited




        
    

        
        Green Africa Airways Limited is a value airline based in Lagos, Nigeria. We are a new carrier that offers safe, reliable and affordable air travel to a much broader group of customers. This positions us as a significant contributor to the economic development of Nigeria and the African continent.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: CAMO Engineer

Job Location: Lagos, Nigeria
Job type: Full-time (Onsite)
Workplace Type: Onsite

Job Role
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Evaluating technical publications to determine their applicability to Green Africa’s fleet such as ADs, SBs, modification publications and repair documents 
	Creating and issuing of engineering order as may be required to maintain Green Africa's fleet in the original state of configuration and complying with applicable publications from the manufacturers and NCAA’s regulatory
	Updating Green Africa’s maintenance manuals such as MP, MCM and RPM as required by internal procedures and NCAA’s regulations
	Monitoring all maintenance documents and ensuring that they are up to date
	Working closely with Technical Planning and Quality Team to ensure compliance with NCAA’s regulations
	Tracking, monitoring, and investigating performance of aircraft systems and components


Qualifications


	Bachelor's degree or HND in Aeronautical Engineering, Aircraft Maintenance Engineering, or a related field
	3-5 years of experience as a CAMO Engineer
	Familiarity with aircraft maintenance software and record-keeping systems





Must have skills:


	Attention to detail
	Effective prioritization of task
	Knowledge of maintenance software and record-keeping systems
	Knowledge of relevant regulatory requirements
	Planning Skill


Good to have skills:


	Analytical skill


What We Offer


	Competitive salary and performance-based incentives tied to strategic outcomes.
	A senior leadership platform with direct access to the MD and Board.
	Career growth and executive development opportunities within a growing real estate group.
	A dynamic, innovative, and professional work environment at one of Abuja’s leading property companies.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Front Desk Officer",
  "description": "Gifra Wireless Network Limited is an Internet Service Provider (ISP) company that handles projects including: Broadband-dedicated internet access solutions, Network infrastructure (WLAN/LAN), Smart City/Home Solutions (IoT) - Optimization and Enterprise phone systems (PABX/IP PBX). We carry out any kind of telecom installation.

Gifra Wireless Network Limited also undertakes telecom training and ICT certifications for fresh telecom and ICT trainees. The Company and its team possess a wealth of experience in telecoms, information, and communication technology which enables it to deliver projects in these areas seamlessly.

As part of our expansion and commitment to service excellence, we are seeking highly skilled, motivated, and result-driven professionals,&nbsp;fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Front Desk Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Abuja (FCT)

Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess relevant qualifications with experience.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their applications to:&nbsp;vacancy@gifrawireless.net&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note


	If you are passionate about telecommunications and want to work in a dynamic and innovative environment, we invite you to apply.
	Application is opened to candidates that reside in Abuja.
",

Front Desk Officer Job at Gifra Wireless Network Limited




        
    

        
        Gifra Wireless Network Limited is an Internet Service Provider (ISP) company that handles projects including: Broadband-dedicated internet access solutions, Network infrastructure (WLAN/LAN), Smart City/Home Solutions (IoT) - Optimization and Enterprise phone systems (PABX/IP PBX). We carry out any kind of telecom installation.

Gifra Wireless Network Limited also undertakes telecom training and ICT certifications for fresh telecom and ICT trainees. The Company and its team possess a wealth of experience in telecoms, information, and communication technology which enables it to deliver projects in these areas seamlessly.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



As part of our expansion and commitment to service excellence, we are seeking highly skilled, motivated, and result-driven professionals, fill the position below:

Job Position: Front Desk Officer

Job Location: Abuja (FCT)

Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess relevant qualifications with experience.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their applications to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note


	If you are passionate about telecommunications and want to work in a dynamic and innovative environment, we invite you to apply.
	Application is opened to candidates that reside in Abuja.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

Job Position: Internal Control Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Victoria Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Requirements


	Education: Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree or Master&rsquo;s Degree in Accounting, Economics, or related discipline
	Qualifications: Professional accounting certification, e.g. ACA, ACCA, CIA, CISA, or other relevant higher business degrees asan added advantage.
	Age: Open-ended
	Experience:&nbsp;Minimum of two (2) years of internal Control/Risk Management experience in a reputable organisation.


Compensation &amp; Benefits


	Salary:&nbsp;N200,000 - N300,000 / Month
	+ robust commission, HMO, and other benefits are also included.


Note


	Read instructions carefully!
	Kindly fill in the required information below if you are interested and qualified.

Internal Control Officer Job at Premium Human Resources Solution Limited




        
    

        
        Premium Human Resources Solution - Our client, a Top management Firm in Lagos, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Internal Control Officer

Job Location: Victoria Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Requirements
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Education: Bachelor’s Degree or Master’s Degree in Accounting, Economics, or related discipline
	Qualifications: Professional accounting certification, e.g. ACA, ACCA, CIA, CISA, or other relevant higher business degrees asan added advantage.
	Age: Open-ended
	Experience: Minimum of two (2) years of internal Control/Risk Management experience in a reputable organisation.


Compensation & Benefits


	Salary: N200,000 - N300,000 / Month
	+ robust commission, HMO, and other benefits are also included.


Note


	Read instructions carefully!
	Kindly fill in the required information below if you are interested and qualified.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Marketing Sales Executive",
  "description": "Estrada International Staffing Solutions (EISS) is a leading HR consulting and talent solutions firm dedicated to helping organizations attract, develop, and retain exceptional talent. We provide comprehensive human resource services across recruitment, outsourcing, background verification, and HR advisory, ensuring our clients achieve sustainable business growth through people excellence.

With a commitment to quality, speed, and professionalism, we partner with organizations of all sizes, ranging from multinationals to indigenous SMEs; across diverse industries. Our tailored solutions are designed to simplify HR processes, enhance workforce capability, and deliver measurable impact.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Marketing Sales Executive

Job Location:&nbsp;Ikate, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a smart, persuasive, and result-driven Real Estate Marketer to promote and market the company&rsquo;s properties and real estate services.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for generating leads, attracting prospective clients, closing property deals, and increasing the company&rsquo;s market presence.
	The candidate must possess strong sales and communication skills, with the ability to build relationships and meet sales targets in a competitive market.


Key Responsibilities


	Market and promote the company&rsquo;s properties and real estate services to prospective clients
	Generate leads through field marketing, networking, referrals, social media, and digital platforms
	Conduct property inspections and site tours with clients
	Build and maintain strong relationships with clients, investors, and partners

Marketing Sales Executive Job at Estrada International Staffing Solutions




        
    

        
        Estrada International Staffing Solutions (EISS) is a leading HR consulting and talent solutions firm dedicated to helping organizations attract, develop, and retain exceptional talent. We provide comprehensive human resource services across recruitment, outsourcing, background verification, and HR advisory, ensuring our clients achieve sustainable business growth through people excellence.

With a commitment to quality, speed, and professionalism, we partner with organizations of all sizes, ranging from multinationals to indigenous SMEs; across diverse industries. Our tailored solutions are designed to simplify HR processes, enhance workforce capability, and deliver measurable impact.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Position: Marketing Sales Executive

Job Location: Ikate, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a smart, persuasive, and result-driven Real Estate Marketer to promote and market the company’s properties and real estate services.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for generating leads, attracting prospective clients, closing property deals, and increasing the company’s market presence.
	The candidate must possess strong sales and communication skills, with the ability to build relationships and meet sales targets in a competitive market.


Key Responsibilities


	Market and promote the company’s properties and real estate services to prospective clients
	Generate leads through field marketing, networking, referrals, social media, and digital platforms
	Conduct property inspections and site tours with clients
	Build and maintain strong relationships with clients, investors, and partners
	Follow up on inquiries and convert prospects into buyers or subscribers
	Prepare and deliver presentations on available properties and investment opportunities
	Meet assigned sales and revenue targets
	Maintain updated records of client interactions and property listings
	Conduct market research to identify trends and customer preferences
	Collaborate with the marketing team on campaigns and promotional activities
	Provide excellent customer service before and after sales.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.
